site.name: Mai fassarar albarkatu
site.defaultDescription: Documentation for the Resource Translator GitHub Action — automated machine translation of resource files via Azure AI Translator.

header.languageDescription: Canja wurin zuwa wannan shafi a cikin wani harshe.
header.languageNoResults: Babu harsuna da suka dace da wannan tace.

search.title: Takaddun bincike
search.idleHelp: Nemo labaran ta batun, tsarin fayil, zaɓin saiti, ko girke-girke. Yi amfani da {up} {down} don kewayawa, {enter} don buɗewa.
search.empty: Babu sakamako. Gwada wani maɓallin keɓaɓɓen maɓallin
search.error: Ba za a iya samun maɓallin keɓaɓɓu a cikin Dev ba. Gudanar da ginin samarwa.
